title: X6853-15.1.0.139SP08-OP001PF001AZ-15.1.2.145SP10-OP001PF001AZ_20260115114105
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
X6853-15.1.2.145SP10(OP001PF001AZ)

Changed Functions:
1. Updated Google Security Patch to January 2026 for enhanced system security.
2. Upgraded the GKI version for enhanced system security.

Fixed Issues:
1. Fixed the occasional unresponsiveness issue with aspect ratio switching in the Portrait mode, delivering smoother operation.
2. Fixed the occasional compatibility issue with PC Connection for more stable cross-device collaboration.
3. Fixed the occasional stability issue during screen recording, improving overall recording reliability.
4. Fixed the issue where the device could occasionally fail to unlock in certain scenarios, making unlocking more reliable and secure.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for more information.
